# A11 Product Studio

> A11 is a product design studio "of the Ambitious" — nine people designing digital products together since 2019. Their longest engagement was five years with Tools for Humanity, designing World App from scratch into one of the most widely used mobile wallets in the world. The work spans crypto, identity, fintech, and real-world-asset products.

Contact: hello@a11studio.com · Book a call: https://calendly.com/a11studio

## Case studies

- [World Money](https://a11.studio/world/money): Designed to help millions receive, manage, and use digital assets through a simple experience — even for people who had never made a crypto transaction.
- [World ID](https://a11.studio/world/id): The identity layer for humans in the age of AI. Makes a complex, unfamiliar concept feel simple, trustworthy, and immediately useful.
- [World Chat](https://a11.studio/world/chat): A communication layer for a world where being human can no longer be assumed — simple to use, grounded in identity, trust, and interaction.
- [Orb App](https://a11.studio/world/orb): Evolved alongside the World network, supporting thousands of operators, devices, and verification workflows across rapidly expanding global operations.
- [Freehold](https://a11.studio/freehold): Portfolio tracking, staking rewards, and tokenized real-world assets in a single mobile experience for modern onchain investors.
- [Districts](https://a11.studio/districts): Turns real cities into a grid of claimable land — own a piece of the map, trade it, and help decide what opens next.
- [Atlans](https://a11.studio/atlans): Bringing athletes, places, and communities together.
- [Relai](https://a11.studio/relai): A Bitcoin-only wallet to buy, save, and self-custody Bitcoin through a simple mobile experience built around trust, ownership, and long-term confidence.
- [TokenStudio](https://a11.studio/tokenstudio): Turns illiquid real-world assets into tradeable digital ownership — invest in property, art, or infrastructure and move value the way the internet moves data.

## Studio

- [Studio](https://a11.studio/studio): About A11 — the team, history, and approach to product design.
- [Manifesto](https://a11.studio/manifesto): The studio's design philosophy and principles.
